title: Just One Little Taste
lesson: Being brave enough to try a new healthy food can lead to a yummy surprise.
prompts: At a cozy family dinner table in the evening, warm indoor light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left, resting their chin on one hand and eyeing a plate of colourful broccoli and carrots, facing the camera with a wary, unsure expression and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} sits with their own plate, lifting a forkful and smiling gently. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At a cozy family dinner table in the evening, warm indoor light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left gently pushing the plate of green broccoli away, facing the camera with a reluctant, frowning expression and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} leans in, resting a hand on the table and watching with patient encouragement. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At a cozy family dinner table in the evening, warm indoor light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left, facing the camera with a curious, considering expression and the face fully visible, holding a small fork with one piece of broccoli. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} smiles warmly and gives an encouraging nod. Exactly two people in the frame — the child and one adult — and no one else. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At a cozy family dinner table in the evening, warm indoor light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits alone in close view taking a brave first little bite of broccoli, eyes scrunched and head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At a cozy family dinner table in the evening, warm indoor light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits with both hands pressed to their cheeks in delight, having just taken a bite, facing the camera with eyes wide open and a surprised smile, the face fully visible, realising the food is delicious. A plate of colourful vegetables in front of them. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At a cozy family dinner table in the evening, warm indoor light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left happily eating from the plate, facing the camera with a joyful smile and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} claps softly, looking proud and pleased. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
texts: At dinner you looked at the green broccoli and orange carrots. Hmm — you weren't so sure about them.
You pushed the plate away with a frown. "I don't want to," you said. Mum waited patiently.
"Just try one little taste," said Mum with a kind nod. You picked up your fork with one piece.
You scrunched your eyes shut and took a tiny, brave bite. Crunch!
Then your eyes popped wide open. It was yummy! What a delicious surprise!
You happily ate up your veggies. Mum clapped, so proud. Being brave was tasty after all!
